items.summary: I don't think there's another more precise way to put this: Its a Reverse 1999 bootleg

items.title: [正面] Gameplay: Fun; Slay the Spire-eqsque with deckbuil...
items.summary:
Gameplay: Fun; Slay the Spire-eqsque with deckbuilder element. The energy system is only applicable for the side content, so if you put yourself into it, you could eat the entire storyline in one sitting, assuming you aren't leaving the computer for like 40 hrs straight.

Story: Good; Gruesome and mysterious. Translation is AI generated though, so it's not exactly top notch. It often genderswaps the characters or describes mechanics with slightly different terms.

Graphics: Art is pretty, ui isn't too janky.

Sound: Music is gorgeous, sound effects are for the most part adequate and the audio quality is crispy. No story voice acting though.

Gacha: Pretty generous, both in terms of rates and the amount of pulls the game gives you. With that being said, you are heavily incentivised to pull dupes, because a major part of character's power is locked behind dupes. Same for the cards (which act as weapons in the game).
